response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: ConvictedCriminal(garry)
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: ConvictedCriminal(garry) & -(FoundGuilty(garry))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: ConvictedCriminal(garry) & -((FoundGuilty(garry) | SentencedToPunishment(garry))) & SentencedToPunishment(garry)
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: FoundGuilty(garry) & SentencedToPunishment(garry)
